_comment: PART D 回归样本（2026-07-06 时效性收口）。patch_release = 用户点名的真实案例，取自 data/candidates/2026-07-05.json 原记录；major_release_counterfactual = 构造的 Opus 级重大发布反事实（id 带 SYNTHETIC 标记，绝不混入真实数据）；nightly = 真实 gemini-cli nightly 标题。期望分数带（expected_max/expected_min）由 scripts/prove_triage_exemption.py 重放验证，pytest 里默认只做 rubric 措辞断言，设 RADAR_LLM_TESTS=1 才真调 haiku 验分数带。

patch_release.title: v2.1.201
patch_release.summary: What's changed Claude Sonnet 5 sessions no longer use the mid-conversation system role for harness reminders

major_release_counterfactual.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.6
major_release_counterfactual.summary: Anthropic today announced Claude Opus 4.6, its next-generation flagship model: a new agentic planning mode, 3x faster tool use, and state-of-the-art results on SWE-bench Verified and OSWorld. Available today in the API, Claude Code and claude.ai.
